iti23:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti23:2.1: “This one quality, monks, when developed & pursued, keeps both kinds of benefit secure:
iti23:2.2: benefit in this life & in lives to come.
iti23:2.4: Heedfulness with regard to skillful qualities.
iti23:2.5: This is the one quality that, when developed & pursued, keeps both kinds of benefit secure:
iti23:2.6: benefit in this life & in lives to come.”
iti23:3.4: you achieve both kinds of benefit:
iti23:4.3: By breaking through to your benefit,
